modules.rationale: Required base token for tokenized fund units.
Limits transfers and subscriptions to approved investors.
Supports pricing discipline through NAV updates.
Creates an operational registry for approved investors.

complianceAssumptions: Engineering outputs are audit-preparation materials, not legal compliance certification.
A qualified legal and regulatory advisor must review the product before launch.
User goal captured: Launch a tokenized income fund.
securityConstraints: No private keys, seed phrases, or API keys in chat or storage.
All user and model output must be rendered as escaped text.
Generated artifacts must trace back to an approved RequirementBrief.
Real deployment remains disabled unless environment-enabled.
unresolvedQuestions: Confirm target chain and custody provider before any live deployment.

tasks.title: Generate Solidity beta scaffold
tasks.scope: Create audit-preparation Solidity artifacts from the approved RequirementBrief with 5 enabled modules.

results.summary: Generated a deterministic Solidity beta scaffold from the RequirementBrief.
risks: Requires external Solidity audit before production deployment.

findings: No hardcoded secrets, seed phrase handling, unsafe HTML rendering, or real deploy enablement detected.
